markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and resolve operational blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CVE Content Blocked:** The CVE Airtable-to-GitHub integration is ready, but content publishing is blocked by a site-wide code freeze until the first week of December.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**CS101 Strategy Pivot:** The team will pivot from fixing content cannibalization (a Q3 priority) to refreshing high-potential pages and filling content gaps. This shift is driven by the discovery that some cannibalizing pages still provide value via AI search citations.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [**PMM Review Bottleneck:** PMM reviews are a bottleneck, delaying article publication. To resolve this and improve product accuracy, GrowthX will create a product description sheet and explore adding an automated fact-checker to the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**New Content Avenues:** The team will explore new content opportunities beyond CS101, including trending topics with low search volume and content for product/plan pages. Ankit will introduce Anthony (copy lead) to discuss this.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)

## Topics

### CS101 Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Generating new CS101 assignments is difficult due to the broad, saturated topic area.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Pivot from Cannibalization:** The team will pause efforts to fix content cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A Q3 analysis found some pages cannibalizing on SERP were still valuable for AI search citations.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
      - [**Decision:** This will be revisited as a half-year activity.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**New Focus Areas:**](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [**Refresh Opportunities:** Update pages with slowed traffic or outdated info.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Untapped Potential:** Create content for identified keyword gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
      - [**Trending Topics:** Generate content for low-volume, high-interest topics (e.g., Wayfinder, Prompt Injection) to build early authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [**AI-Powered Content:** Create content on topics where SentinelOne's platform is AI-powered.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [**Audit Refinement:** The previous 3,300-URL audit was flawed (sitemap has \~1,050 pages). GrowthX will rerun it using the sitemap as the source to ensure accurate data.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### PMM Review & Product Accuracy

  - [**Bottleneck:** PMM reviews are delaying publication of CS101 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Accuracy Issue:** PMM feedback frequently flags inaccurate or "stretched" product descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Product Description Sheet:** GrowthX will create a sheet of AI-related keywords for PMM to mark as relevant or irrelevant to SentinelOne's AI-powered offerings. This provides a clear guide for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Automated Fact-Checker:** GrowthX Labs may add a "product fact-checker" step to the content pipeline. This tool would use a product description artifact to automatically flag inconsistencies in drafts, similar to the existing writing guideline checker.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### CVE Database Launch & Code Freeze

  - [**Status:** The Airtable-to-GitHub integration ticket is filed and ready for the code freeze lift.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The code freeze is expected to lift in the **first week of December**.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [**Performance:** The CVE database launch was successful, attracting **1,000+ users** in its first week.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [**Documentation:** Ankit requested documentation of the CVE content generation and Contentstack workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Rerun the CS101 audit using the sitemap as the source.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [Create the AI-related keyword sheet for PMM review.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [Draft a proposal for new content avenues (trending topics, AI-powered content).](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [Revise 3 CS101 articles and deliver them early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Generate 2 approved Airtable topics next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [**Mansi:**](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Send a reminder to PMM for pending reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Marcus:**](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [Document the CVE content generation and Contentstack workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Ankit:**](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
      - [Introduce Anthony (copy lead) to the GrowthX team to discuss new content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/xNeZjY6bNvSiriPC3cQi6_F3VPm-Q-xX?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
